title: Embedding Simpul: Node2Vec dan Representasi Laten
scope: Learned graph representations (Node embeddings like Node2Vec). Academic primary.
key_concepts: Instead of manually counting degrees or paths, we can learn a low-dimensional vector representation (embedding) for each node.
This is a prime example of 'representasi yang dipelajari mesin' on graphs.
Node2Vec uses biased random walks to generate 'sentences' of nodes, then applies word embedding techniques (like Word2Vec) to learn vectors.
Nodes that appear in similar structural contexts end up close together in the latent vector space.

definitions.meaning: Vektor numerik padat yang mewakili sebuah simpul, di mana posisi vektor menangkap struktur dan properti graf simpul tersebut.
Eksplorasi graf dengan melompat dari satu simpul ke simpul tetangga secara acak untuk memetakan struktur lokal.

examples: By taking random walks on a network of academic papers, Node2Vec produces a 64-dimensional vector $\mathbf{z}_v$ for each paper. Standard logistic regression can then predict the paper's topic using this vector.
latex_equations: Probabilitas transisi untuk *random walk* dari simpul $v$ ke tetangganya: $P(c_i = x \mid c_{i-1} = v) = \frac{\pi_{vx}}{Z}$

Fungsi objektif *embedding* yang memaksimalkan probabilitas tetangga $\mathcal{N}_S(u)$ dari sebuah simpul $u$ diberikan representasinya $\mathbf{z}_u$: $\max_{\mathbf{z}} \sum_{u \in V} \log P(\mathcal{N}_S(u) \mid \mathbf{z}_u)$
exclude: Deep derivation of Skip-Gram or hierarchical softmax.
relations: Marks the pivot from designed (s04/s05) to learned (s06/s07) in graph data. Mention the spectrum: this is 'representasi yang dipelajari mesin'.
